text:
There once was a little fish. That little fish lived happily there in his own bubble. One day there flew something dark. It hovered by his little house. Was it a hawk? That would be frightful! It swooped closer. Nope. There buzzed something tiny. Something furry? Nope. It was definitely small. It wasn't even alive. It was a speck.

That speck grew bigger. It landed. Wow! That wasn't scary! That sparkly? That was awesome!

You see, that speck was...
